title: eulophia roseolabia
intro: Eulophia roseolabia, a terrestrial orchid species, is native to tropical Africa, characterized by its distinctive rose-colored labellum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and snake bites, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Eulophia roseolabia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce pain and swelling. In herbal preparations, the plant's parts are often dried and used in infusions or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
